base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rat_king — a character (boss) from 1991 turtles in time. Rat King — Stage 2 Alley Cat Blues boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rat King — Stage 2 Alley Cat Blues boss
